description: Read-only semantic search MCP server for Obsidian vaults using local Ollama embeddings.
name: io.github.DalecB/obsidian-semantic-mcp

environmentVariables.description: Absolute path to the local Obsidian vault.
environmentVariables.name: OBSIDIAN_VAULT_ROOT

environmentVariables.description: Directory for the external SQLite index, logs, and cache.
environmentVariables.name: OBSIDIAN_SEMANTIC_MCP_HOME

environmentVariables.description: Ollama embedding model name. Defaults to bge-m3.
environmentVariables.name: OBSIDIAN_EMBED_MODEL

environmentVariables.description: Ollama API base URL. Defaults to http://localhost:11434.
environmentVariables.name: OLLAMA_BASE_URL

environmentVariables.description: Set to true to run incremental indexing when the server starts.
environmentVariables.name: OBSIDIAN_SEMANTIC_STARTUP_INDEX

environmentVariables.description: Set to true to allow include_sensitive tool calls.
environmentVariables.name: OBSIDIAN_SEMANTIC_ALLOW_SENSITIVE

title: Obsidian Semantic Search
